question_text: Which of the following is the correct definition of density?
options: The amount of space an object takes up
The mass of a substance per unit volume
How heavy an object feels when you pick it up
The speed at which an object moves
correct_answer: The mass of a substance per unit volume
explanation: Density is defined as how much mass is packed into a certain volume. It tells us how tightly packed the particles of a material are.
source_name: KS3 Physics Curriculum - Matter and Materials
